entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Students study a life by Plutarch for two terms and spend the other term exploring the history and structure of Canada's constitutional monarchy.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Citizenship: Grade 9 (Canada)

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
The book Canada's Constitutional Monarchy is intended to be read over two years (Grades 8 and 9). However, since this is the first year this book will be used in the curriculum, Grades 8 and 9 will have the same readings in 2026-2027.
If a student hasn't studied Canada's government yet, consider having them take the Grade 7 government course first.
